microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized system**, standardizing end-to-end workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and **self-service scheduling capabilities** that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable campaign-delivery model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a **rack-level drill program in 4 months** with a 94% recovery rate — surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation framework adopted across engineering orgs.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, managing critical-path dependencies and stakeholder alignment across engineering, operations, and partner teams, including a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract.

Scaled team leverage through AI-driven automation by building an internal AI agent and restructuring planning workflows, reducing **planning cycle time by 39%** and increasing overall drill capacity by 21% without adding headcount.

Drove cross-functional communication and coordination across 6+ partner orgs throughout each program lifecycle, facilitating alignment meetings, surfacing risks with impact analysis, and delivering **actionable mitigation plans** to keep multi-stakeholder initiatives on critical path.
microsoft_2023: Championed **campaign adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting user demos and targeted training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key teams and saved **37 engineering hours monthly** — accelerating time-to-value for a flagship product initiative.

Influenced the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ user interviews** with Azure service teams, synthesizing critical feature gaps into prioritized recommendations that shaped the next planning cycle.

Improved data integrity and retrieval by implementing rigorous **metadata standards** and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, cutting lookup time by 83% and enabling faster, more consistent cross-team information exchange.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by driving cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, coordinating execution across 140+ teams through structured communication and critical-path management.

Mobilized a product strategy to reduce operational toil during region launches, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual effort** per region and building a roadmap that prioritized automation of the highest-impact critical-path activities.

Enabled leadership to target automation gaps and allocate resources to high-impact initiatives by engineering a **Power BI dashboard** that tracked operational toil and campaign progress across 140+ teams in real time.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and proactively flagging risks with contingency plans to keep the program on schedule.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies — sprint planning, standups, and retrospectives — **prioritizing the backlog** to resolve 40+ high-priority tickets, stabilize the developer intake process, and maintain team momentum through a high-ambiguity migration program.

Drove strategic alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a repeatable, scalable delivery workflow for future rollouts.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by managing the end-to-end campaign lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals — streamlining scoping, estimation, and invoicing workflows through a new CRM process that improved execution consistency and reduced turnaround time.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google Business profile to improve targeting and campaign performance across key channels.

Strengthened leadership pricing decisions by conducting financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, identifying margin leaks and delivering data-driven recommendations that informed budget planning and improved campaign ROI.

tailoring_notes: 'end-to-end planning and execution' (JD: Campaign Planning and Execution) woven into microsoft_ft bullet#2 and pro_painters bullet#1 to mirror Plaid's campaign delivery language directly.

'critical-path' and 'contingency plans' (JD: Prioritization and Critical Path Management; Change Management and Contingency Planning) inserted into amazon_robotics bullet#1 and microsoft_ft bullet#6 to surface risk/mitigation framing the JD calls out explicitly.

'cross-functional communication and coordination' and 'alignment meetings' (JD: Cross-Functional Communication and Coordination; Meeting Facilitation) named verbatim in microsoft_ft bullet#6 and echoed in microsoft_2022 bullet#1 to match Plaid's exact vocabulary for stakeholder management.

'actionable mitigation plans' and 'impact analysis' (JD: Risk Management and Problem Solving) placed in microsoft_ft bullet#6 to directly reflect Plaid's requirement for proactive risk communication with context and recommendations.
